SZR_Msg1: Attention all survivors. Safe zone is operational. Coordinates: 13050, 9750.
SZR_Msg2: Perimeter secured. Supply crates available at the safe zone.
SZR_Msg3: All survivors — head northwest toward the old military base. Walls are holding.
SZR_Msg4: This is SafeZone broadcast. We have shelter, supplies, and defenses. You are not alone.
SZR_Msg5: Patrol reports no breach. Safe zone remains secure. Stay on this frequency for updates.
